name: Missing Episodes
description: Displays a report of TV episodes missing from your library.
overview: Displays a report of TV episodes missing from your library.

name: Specials Filter
description: Removes specials (Season 0) from configured TV show libraries after each library scan. Configurable per library and per show.
overview: Removes specials (Season 0) from configured TV show libraries after each library scan. Configurable per library and per show.

versions.changelog:
Initial release of Specials Filter plugin

Per-library and per-show toggle to remove Season 0 (Specials) after
every library scan. Configurable per library, per show (Default/Remove/Keep),
and per individual special episode (blacklist). No files are deleted from disk.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
